specific_question: How long did it take first-time users to complete their initial booking on MediConn's platform in 2024?
answer: First-time users in 2024 took an average of 12.5 minutes to complete their initial booking on MediConn's platform. UX tracking data showed that 53% of first-time users required customer support intervention during the registration process. Post-booking satisfaction surveys indicated that patients who needed support intervention rated their booking experience 3.2 out of 5, compared to 4.4 out of 5 for those who completed booking independently.
dr_question: The article published on TechTarget in January 2024 cited the MGMA's findings, showing that patient communication technology addresses digital front door issues like poor booking systems. How might MediConn Solutions enhance patient access to virtual consultations and prescription management services in Q1 2026 to reduce wait times and boost satisfaction and retention?
